svg.text: Autonomous SecOps Agent with Mesh-Distributed Tool Execution
The LLM generates text. The gateway delivers it.
No autonomous decisions. No real tool execution.
The LLM reasons, selects tools, executes them,
observes results, and loops until task is done.
Focus: autonomous operations on real infrastructure
loop until resolved or budget exhausted
28 TOOLS - REAL EXECUTION ON REAL INFRASTRUCTURE
TAILSCALE MESH - WIREGUARD ENCRYPTED - ZERO TRUST
All nodes encrypted point-to-point via WireGuard | No open ports | NAT traversal
OpenClaw is an inspiring open-source project that solves multi-channel messaging brilliantly.
TokioAI solves a different problem: autonomous operations on distributed infrastructure.
Different tools for different missions. Both open. Both necessary.
